title: Boogiepop OST Music Pack
description:
This resource pack replaces most of Minecrafts songs with scenic and calming songs from the 'Boogiepop and Others 2019' anime OST!
Some are also from Rei Harakawa, since his music matches the same vibe and he has worked on the older original anime.
body: This Resource Pack uses nearly every song in the 'Boogiepop and Others' OST matching their respected atmosphere. If you're looking for a specific song, you'll find it in no time while scrolling through this playlist: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I8jC1JJTiqM&list=PLg9v135qpC4oGsnuJ47o8gNZ9C8u570S6
